summary:
GEOPOLITICAL DEVELOPMENTS AND ALLIANCES: Brandon discusses recent news articles concerning global geopolitical tensions, explicitly mentioning reports of Germany and other NATO allies sending troops to Greenland to defend it against the United States. Brandon views this as a fulfillment of prior warnings regarding strained relations with Europe. Furthermore, Brandon highlights reports of Israel and Arab nations asking President Trump to refrain from attacking Iran. Brandon also details an observed alliance between Russia and Cuba, mentioning biological weapons stored in 50-gallon drums underground in Cuba, intended for a future attack on America through Florida via mules. Brandon notes that Russia seeks alliances involving Venezuela, Colombia, and the BRICS nations, while Trump is seen temporarily pausing the actions of Russia and China.

SPIRITUAL VISIONS REGARDING PRESIDENT TRUMP: Brandon recounts a spiritual vision featuring a glowing door specifically designated for President Trump to pass through, representing major upcoming decisions. The door was obstructed by a black fence covered in briars and rose bush thorns, requiring corporate prayer to clear the path. Brandon describes this process as spiritually cutting back the thorns with a machete to enable Trump to fulfill a major assignment. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of undergirding national leadership with prayer, specifically praying for Trump to finish his term strongly and for the protection of secret intelligence personnel and troops.

WEALTH TRANSFER AND ACTIVE FAITH: Brandon outlines a coming wealth transfer from the wicked to the righteous, stressing that this process requires active participation rather than passive waiting. Brandon insists that believers must contend for this wealth by listening closely to divine instructions regarding financial investments and timing. Drawing parallels to biblical stories like David fighting Goliath and the turning of water into wine, Brandon argues that faith requires putting plans into motion. Brandon asserts complete dependence on divine guidance for financial decisions and personal provision, stating a willingness to perform manual labor if necessary to provide for family.

NATURAL DISASTERS AND TRIBULATION PROPHECIES: Brandon details extensive visions of catastrophic natural disasters. Hen foresees a massive tsunami hitting the Pacific Northwest, extending up to British Columbia, causing widespread destruction and an estimated 30,000 casualties. Further visions include a devastating earthquake splitting Japan in half, widespread volcanic activity along the Ring of Fire, and a major eruption off Japan's coast. Brandon also describes a supernatural golden covering over Yellowstone National Park tearing open, leading to a violent volcanic eruption. Additionally, Brandon shares visions of an asteroid striking the earth, completely destroying islands like Cuba, Puerto Rico, and the Bahamas, and triggering a massive tsunami that reaches Miami. Brandon categorizes the extreme devastation from the asteroid and major earthquakes as events of the coming tribulation.

THEOLOGICAL DOCTRINES AND THE HOLY SPIRIT: Brandon shares specific theological beliefs, explicitly rejecting the flat-earth theory and asserting a pre-tribulation rapture doctrine, arguing that believers will not experience the seven-year tribulation period. Brandon also criticizes certain teachings of the Catholic Church and Mormonism as false doctrines, while maintaining love for the individuals within those groups. Brandon heavily emphasizes the necessity of the baptism of the Holy Spirit and speaking in tongues, frequently recommending the book Why Tongues by Kenneth E. Hagin. Brandon describes the Holy Spirit as a literal, barrel-chested, green figure representing life, and insists that praying in tongues is essential for spiritual growth, receiving divine guidance, and walking in healing and miracles. Brandon calls for believers to reject flakiness, stand firm in their faith, and utilize the blood of Jesus for protection over their homes, families, and finances.
rawData: [January 16, 2026]-[The calm before the storm]-[https://youtu.be/SZttUyrnsRQ]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again today. We really appreciate y'all always showing up and praying with us. It's such a blessing. We really prayed hard last night and I believe we've seen a lot of results, all to the glory of God. Isn't that amazing? It's kind of like putting a fire out. It's like you have a fire extinguisher and you can see it kind of going across the world—a defusing of things right now. You can see all the things that are happening in the world right now with all the major articles that Braden found today, with even President Trump and Israel saying don't strike Iran right now and the other Arab nations. And I thought, well, isn't that interesting? It felt like it was a volcano that was getting ready to explode yesterday as I was interceding all day long. We could feel the pressure of this thing mounting and mounting. It was to the point where I told Diana, 'This thing is about to go off right now.' It felt so imminent, but the Lord said, 'This can't be done by yourself. You're going to have to have corporate intercession.' So He said, 'Bring it to the people and pray last night over what we were seeing.' And so that's what we did. I want to show you some of the articles that came in the news today that Braden found that I believe are a result of all of us praying. You had the WWPs praying with Sister Billy and her group, and there's a lot of you that come from over there to our broadcast, and we're so grateful for every single one of you. I want to show... do you have any of those articles? Yes. Germany. This is what I thought was kind of interesting. Remember I told you when I was looking in the spirit, I felt, 'Don't—you're going to escalate this if he goes after NATO... if he goes after Greenland.' I felt such a red light, green light, and the Lord was showing us this is going to burn bridges so greatly with Europe if he does this. Now, a lot of people say, 'I don't care if he burns bridges or not.' Go back to that article. 'Germany and other NATO allies sending troops to Greenland amid Trump threats.' So they're sending troops to defend Greenland against the United States of America. And I thought, that says something—that our allies are sending their troops to defend a nation against us because I said it will come across as a bully. I said this will affect the midterms; I saw this affecting midterms and it was very negative. There's a lot of people who said, 'Brandon, I just don't believe that we'll lose any kind of seats in the House or the Senate. We're going to do a landslide home run again just like we did in 2024. We're going to do it in 2026 and we're just going to do all this.' I said this is where the Lord said, 'Don't underestimate your enemy. Don't underestimate the darkness on both sides.' I'm not going to sit here and say everything is always bright and sunny on the Republican side, but I'm going to tell you, for the most part, a lot of the way that the Republicans vote is biblical Christian values, and so that's why we always sway that way. But the Lord said, 'Don't underestimate your enemy. You must pray for President Trump to finish his term. You must pray for him to finish, live long, finish strong, and not just barely getting by, but flourish.' There was a major door last night that we were seeing when we got up to it. I saw this major door that was a beautiful door. It was glowing with all this beautiful light, but it was a door for only Trump to go through. It involved major decisions that he was going to make to get through this door. But in front of this door was a black fence that had briars and rose bush thorns wrapped into it, and we had to cut it back. I know it's symbolic, okay? It's not a real door. For all you baby Christians that are just coming on here, this is not a real door; this is a spiritual door. There's something in the spirit realm the Lord's trying to show us. So we are opening that door by faith, praying over whatever this door is that the Father has for President Trump. As for the briars, we prune them back. We're taking everything off, opening and making the gate possible to get through in the spirit realm. All this is bathed in prayer; this is symbolic. So the Lord showed us that door and we were to undergird him in prayer by lifting his hands and praying over these doors that the Lord has for him. For He said, 'This is a door that I have presented for him, but you've got to obey this in prayer for a major assignment.' So we saw that door and we saw that assignment last night. I could see us hacking away with a machete in the spirit realm or a sword, cutting back those thorns and those briars so that he could walk through and do what he's supposed to do. That's what the body of Christ is called to do—to pray for our leadership. Pray for our governors, our mayors, our police department, whoever is protecting this. We pray for our leadership. And so that's what we did last night. We saw that, and then I saw again the red light, green light. The Lord was showing me about the troops, praying for the troops, praying for the secret intel—our friends. The Lord will not allow me to say a lot of what I saw last night for the safety of our people who are trying to protect our nation. I'm just going to bypass it and move on because I don't want to get a spanking, and for their safety, it's just better. But okay, this is what we're going to do. We're going to go over some of these other articles. Do you have any more articles? 'Israel and Arab nations ask Trump to refrain from attacking Iran for right now.' I thought that was interesting. That's what I'm saying. That's a—I believe that is a defusing and trying to, because of what they're getting on the ground, us praying for the people that are in harm's way. And this article could be old news right now—I don't know when he got this—but it just came out today. So, very interesting. Any other news? Then you had Russia. Russia says blackmail and threats against Cuba are unacceptable. We already know that I saw Russia reaching out to Cuba, trying to have an underground alliance like the 1960s Cuban missile crisis. The Lord said, 'Watch old alliances, for they'll try to be rebirthed.' And I saw Russia giving biological weapons to Cuba and they put them underneath the ground in Cuba. I saw 50-gallon drums. I saw a vial—it looked like a cylinder sphere thing with a biohazard on it. And the Lord showed me this was a planned future attack through mules against America through Florida—down in Florida, Miami in particular. And so the Lord showed us all that. Well, we see Russia coming to bat for Cuba because they needed Cuba, but they wanted Venezuela. They wanted Colombia. They want all the alliance for the BRICS. But this is what I was seeing when we were diffusing and taking apart their foundation of what they wanted. Little by little, they get in a panic. It's putting the bear in a corner. And I saw us poking the bear. Remember how many times I said, 'Be careful poking the bear.' As I saw President Trump cracking his whip, and in the visions in the past, he was standing on that stand and he was cracking his whip and he was making the bear pause and the dragon pause, and for this season, they were pausing. But the Lord said, 'Watch how they pause just for a season.' It doesn't mean that they stop forever. They just pause. A lion tamer can only get the lion to pause. And He said, 'I will use him right now to get some stuff done so that the body of Christ can move around and get things done more freely than what they could have if Kamala Harris would have been on the scene. I will use him to get the church ready for a major outpouring of My spirit for what you're about to see, for the greatest move of God we've ever seen before.' And I saw the Lord using him again for finances as he was pedaling at the canoe trying to keep the economy from going over the side. They said, 'Brandon, you say a lot of stuff about the economy. You say, "How come we haven't seen anything?"' Then this is Satan's wheelhouse. This is what he's best at is finances. And this is not going to take somebody being limp-wristed, sitting there being idly getting by going, 'Well, God, you're just going to rain it down on me.' You have to... The Lord said, 'If you want this next wealth transfer, you're going to have to contend for it.' Be a contender. How bad do you want it? How bad are you willing to pray and come against because we are in the end of the end? How bad do you want the wealth transfer? How bad do you want it, church? You're not just going to sit idly by and pluck it like ripe cherries off a tree. The Lord showed me that you're going to have to be listening to Him every single step of the way. Listening to the Father's voice so that you don't hear the stranger's voice on when to invest, what to invest in, and when to get out. Know when to hold them, know when to fold them, know when to walk away, know when to run. Like Kenny Rogers, you've got to count your money when you're sitting at the table. It's serious. But most people think, 'Well, it's just going to happen,' and you just, 'Oh, I feel sorry for myself.' Nobody feels sorry for you. That's what the Lord told me. He said, 'Nobody feels sorry for you. Nobody feels sorry for My cry. Nobody feels sorry for the wealth transfer. How bad do you want it? How bad do you want to be hearing Me for what I'm going to tell you to do to get the wealth from the wicked laid up for the righteous?' You're going to have to take the land; be a contender. David had to go and slay the giant. David had to go and take the land from the Philistines. He didn't sit back idly by and say, 'Well, God, will you just help do it all for me?' No. The Lord said, 'Put your boat into motion and I will anoint you to get it done.' And most people in the body of Christ have a passive mentality of 'God, will you just help me do it?' because they've been taught some kind of fable or a mailbox mentality and think that it's just going to happen. The Bible says that He'll bless whatever you put your hands to. And most people don't want to go out and contend for it. What is He telling you to do? Whenever they turned the water into wine, Mary said, 'Whatever He tells you to do, do it.' They didn't walk by and say, 'Jesus, fill the pots with water too. Get it all ready and you do it all, Lord, and just supernaturally do it with your holy angel choir.' They said, 'Whatever He tells you to do, do it.' There was a part that you had to play in it. And that's what the Lord was showing me today. We even prayed over it, and the Lord said there's a part for you to play in this. We're co-laborers. We will work together, son. But you don't sit on your blessed assurance waiting for the harvest to come in. How bad are you a contender for the harvest of souls? How bad do you want it? How bad are you going to work for Me and help Me out? He's not waiting. 'Well, send your angels, Lord. Send your Holy Ghost and fire.' We've got to put the pews down or the chairs, have a tent ready, have the fires out, tell the people to come, and then the glory comes. That's His job. He brings the glory. It's like me. The Lord said, 'I want you to go on prayer every day. I want you to do as much as you can. I know you're going to take some breaks, but I want you to make it a staple to pray and have people come pray with you, and you'll change things.' But I'm going to tell you, I brought a platform and we made computers. We got the lights. We got all this, but I can't make the gift happen. I can't turn it on. I can yield myself to Him and say, 'Father, here am I. Use me.' And if You don't show up, I'm just dabber. But whenever He puts this super on your natural, you turn into Superman. But until then, we have a treasure in earthen vessels that the excellency of the power is known of Him and not of me. I can't do anything outside of Him. And most people think, like they say, these soothsayers contact you and they say, 'Brandon, come on our show.' These fortune tellers and all these people want me to come on their shows and talk to them and tell them how... I don't have nothing. Brandon doesn't have any ability to do anything. It's His ability on my flesh that allows me to see what's coming to tell you to pray. But I can't do it outside of myself. I am solely dependent on everything He tells me to do. And that's where it has to be with this end-time harvest money. I am solely dependent on You telling me what to invest in and where to put my money, Father. Because without You, I can do nothing. Show me what You want me to do. And I will not move until I hear Your voice. That's why you get quiet. There's so much clutter. There's so much static. People are always trying to hurry God. They're microwave. 'Well, Brandon, you pray too long. Boy, you think a lot about yourself praying for two hours.' No, it's me trying to cultivate a relationship. If my life doesn't display relationship, then don't watch me. But I'm trying. Hey, I love you. I'm here. I'll help you however I can with this vessel. And if You can put that treasure inside of me and use it today, then use it. If not, then I'm going to go on about my business and try to do something with my hands to provide for my family. But either way, Lord, You told me to work. A man that doesn't provide for his own is worse than an infidel. I will do whatever I've got to do to provide for my wife and my kids. And you know what? That's the way I think any godly man or any woman should be. Maybe your husband can't work, but anybody that doesn't provide for his own is worse than an infidel. Try to take care and do something. Put your boat into motion. Stop being lazy. That's why I tell people... They say, 'Brandon, what do you do?' I do whatever I can. If I have to mow grass, I'll mow grass. If I have to clean a car, I'll clean a car. You don't know how many cars I cleaned. Detail business, polishing wheels, whatever you've got to do, you do it. Especially when you're not real smart. You keep pushing and you keep doing whatever you've got to do. And some days are easier than others. But you know, God is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. I believe in the power of the seed. I bring all that up because of where we are in these end times, and I know the storm is coming. I know where we are by the Spirit of God. We are at that little... I feel a calm right now today. I felt like we did something—we diffused something huge. It's like cutting off the Mission Impossible fuse; you cut it off and you go, "Ah, we were right there from the ignition switch." Boom. That thing was about to go off, but the body of Christ came in there with two seconds left on the clock. You have that "ah" moment in the movie, you know? That's where we were last night. We went and we cut the red wire right in time. You're sweating bullets and you go, "It didn't go. We did it! The red wire got cut." That's what I feel like we do sometimes in the spirit realm. That's where we're like Mission Impossible. We're like Jason Bourne, you know? I like those kind of movies—Mission Impossible, James Bond, the suspense. I feel like that's what we look like in the spirit realm sometimes. I always picture myself as that: "Hey, we're coming in; we're the secret assassins working for the Lord, helping diffuse things and work for Him and pray." Most people say, "Oh, Brandon, come on." No, it's a relationship. I want to be that for my Father, that we can pray and we can go into the enemy's camp and take back what he's stolen from us. "I went to the enemy's camp and I took back what he stole from me; he's under my feet," you know. I like those old songs, but I wanted just to encourage y'all a little bit today. You see the things in the news, you see what's going on, but we have more work to do. So, let's take communion and pray. I won't take you all night; I try to keep it shorter. It's 19 minutes; it goes quick, man. Praise the Lord. I was going to tell your mama to come in and write down if the Lord wants to show us anything. But isn't it amazing? I think it's interesting. You can see so many people walking in a gift and they try to have some kind of arrogant attitude that they're doing anything. Don't you understand that He can use anybody? Don't you understand that He can touch anybody? If He can use a donkey, He can use anybody. He's not bound by us. If you get a big head and you get a bad attitude, He'll just bypass you and use somebody else. We have this treasure in earthen vessels. If He wants to show us something, we'll pray tonight, baby, and you can write it down. I love our little book because Diana takes all these notes and she has all this stuff in here of what He's told us. And this is so precious. Yeah, somebody sent it to us—I don't know who it was, but thank you. We get little treasures like that—somebody sends us a little booklet or some kind of Bible. It's really meaningful. So, Father, I thank You, Lord, for Your body. Lord, we thank You for how good You have been to us. And we thank You, Father, that You've rebuked the devourer for our sake. We thank You, Lord, that we're healed and whole and well by Your stripes. Father, I thank You that You said You rebuke the devourer for our sake. Well, I plead the blood over my eyes and if there's anything You want me to see, if there's anything You want me to do, Lord, we're here. And Lord, we warn the people of what's to come. We apply the blood and we thank You, Lord, for what's to come. You've been good to us and Your mercy endures forever. For the Lord is good and His mercy endures forever. Thank you, Lord, for your old songs. Hear: "All sinners come home." Your heart is the harvest, Father—the ones in the way back fields. We call them home tonight. All the ones in the back fields, we call them home tonight. All our unsaved loved ones, all the ones that we've stood for so much time and we've said, "Father, are they ever coming home?" Father, I thank you, Lord, that they're going to say, "Hey, what shall we do to be saved? What shall we do to be saved? What does it take to come to the father today?" And we call them forth in the mighty name of Jesus, out of the pit of hell into the kingdom of God. And we thank you, Lord, for the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. We thank you, Lord, that the wells of fire spring forth out of us and we don't lose our saltiness in these last days—that we remain salty and people see the salt. They taste the salt and they taste and see that the Lord is good. And Father, it's the goodness and the mercy that follow us all the days of our life, Lord, that when people see the light, they see it like it was on Moses's face, Father, and it's on us. That as he is, so are we in this world. And then when people see the love of God shed abroad in our hearts, it's all over us. And they say, "What is it? I just feel something different on you that we're not church usual; we're church unusual." I ask, Father, that every single one of us would have that spark. It's all about the harvest, the healings that we're about to see, the creative miracles that we're about to experience, the dead being raised, the blinded eyes being open, the ears popping open, and the glory of the Lord manifesting in his services. This is not for goosebumps and tickles, but to bring in the harvest for one last time. We may get excited about all of it. We've been anticipating great things, and creative miracles and signs and wonders will follow them that believe. But the ultimate thing of why we will see the signs and the wonders that follow them that believe is to save that which was lost. Father, I thank you, Lord, for pouring out your spirit upon all flesh and another fresh fire. Father, this world, this sick and dying world as we watch all these things going on, they just need one moment with you. If they could just have one touch from Jesus—if we could just bring them to the throne room and bring them in, have one touch—one fresh touch from Jesus would change their life forever. We thank you, Lord, that you're no respecter of persons and if you did it for me, Father, you'll do it for them. It says no man comes to the father unless he's called by him. We thank you, Lord, that you're calling in the lost tonight. All you lost sinners, come home. Come home. Come home. You who are weary, come home, softly, tenderly, Jesus is calling. Come home. It's a silent moment, son. I feel him. We're calling them in right now, out of the darkness and into light. Out of the darkness, let the light flood their hearts. We're calling them in right now. Jesus, Jesus, Jesus. There's just something about your name, Master, Savior, Jesus, like a fragrance after the rain. Father, kings and kingdoms will all pass away, but there's something about your name. Kings and kingdoms will all pass away, but there's something about your name. Jesus, Jesus, Jesus. There's just something about your name, Master, Savior, Jesus, like a fragrance after the rain. There's many of you that have wanted to speak in tongues. There's many of you that have never experienced the baptism of the Holy Spirit with evidence of speaking in other tongues. And the Lord said, "Tonight is your night. Tonight is your night. Reach up by faith. Raise your hands and say, 'Fill me with the Holy Ghost. Fill me with the Holy Ghost. Fill me with speaking in tongues to overflow. Touch my lips with that coal of fire, Father, and fill me right now with the baptism of the Holy Ghost and fire.'" And begin to speak in other tongues. He's not going to grab your tongue and wag it for you. You've got to put your boat in motion and bring syllables out. It's not just some kind of gibberish. Let the Holy Ghost flow out of you. Start with it. If it's just a couple little syllables, start with it and keep growing. Thank you, Lord, for being filled with the Holy Spirit. Be being filled, not just once, but filled to overflow. Overflow out of your belly. Out of your belly shall flow rivers of living water. Let that Holy Ghost flow out of you tonight. Let the Holy Spirit take control over you tonight. But I still love the Catholics. Just because I believe you have a false doctrine and some of your stuff is really messed up, I still love you and I still pray with you. And they say, 'Well, Brandon, I believe your theology is messed up.' Well, we can agree to disagree, but still it means I love you. Do I feel like all Catholics are going to hell? No, I'm not the judge of your soul. All I know is the Bible says, 'Unless a man is born again, he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.' That's what you believe. I believe you're full of poo. I don't believe that at all. I believe in Acts chapter 2 and I believe the gifts are for today just like they were back then. I have fruit. If you're going to spend that much time with me, you need to know what I think, right? You spend more time with me than you spend almost anywhere else. So at least you need to know what Brandon thinks if you're going to listen to me. I'm just real with you. And like I said, I ain't perfect, but at least I stand for what I stand for. Now, I've seen things and I've touched them, and nothing happened because I didn't have control over it. My friend Billy teaches me about sovereignty and about things, and I learn more about that through him and through Kathryn and all of them from the Word of Faith crew. "Name it, claim it," and all the things that we've learned through the years through Brother Hagin. So you mix the two and you go, "Hey, where does it come out?" It's beautiful. God is a good God and He loves us. But when you tweak things and you see fruit in different people's lives—when my friend has been healed of cancer, stage four cancer twice, on death's doorstep twice—you listen to the fruit of what they have. That's why I follow his ministry. When you see fruit, you go, "Hold on a minute. You've been healed of cancer twice. Stage four cancer documented by the doctor. I want to know what you know. And if you don't have fruit and you keep preaching it, after a while, you want to go, "What? Okay, where am I missing it?" But if you have fruit and you're preaching something, let me hear what you're saying because you will know them by their fruit. And I just get tired of flakiness in churches. Don't you want to see some real sons and daughters of God rise up and be real? Instead, you see your friends die from COVID and you go, "What's the fruit? What's up with this? Is what we believe real? Are we believing believers?" You know, I want to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt us. Teach us when you have people around you that have a virus they're dying from. And I hear people go, "Well, we'll believe God when the next virus comes, brother. We're going to stand and fight against it." But I thought all of you were cowards during COVID and hid. You shut your churches down, but we're going to be big and bad now? When the next virus comes, they tell me, "Brandon, you're teaching fear." We're going to stand against it, but where were you during COVID? You were hiding in your house. Shut up. But do you really believe what you believe? There were friends—my mom and dad's friends—there in the hospital, and he died. His name was Bob.
